2016-001.questionText: Concerning congenital ureteropelvic junction (UPJ) obstruction, which one of the following is TRUE?
2016-001.explanation:
(A) 錯：[[UPJ obstruction]]UPJ obstruction 是兒童水腎最常見的原因，不是 uncommon。
(B) 錯：最常見的表現是產前超音波發現的水腎（incidental hydronephrosis），或是間歇性腰痛，UTI 是可能表現之一但非最常見。
(C) 錯：男性多於女性。
(D) 正確：Crossing vessel 的存在會降低 endopyelotomy 的成功率（從約 82% 降至 33%），因此影響手術方式的選擇。不過需注意，crossing vessel 降低的主要是 endopyelotomy 的成功率；對 dismembered pyeloplasty 而言影響較小，因為 pyeloplasty 可以將 UPJ 重建至 crossing vessel 前方。

options.text: It is an uncommon cause of hydronephrosis in children.
Urinary tract infection is the most common presentation.
Females and males are affected equally.
The presence of crossing vessels decreases the success rate of pyeloplasty.

2016-002.questionText: Concerning adrenal adenomas, which one is TRUE?
2016-002.explanation:
A. 正確. Adrenal adenoma 佔所有腎上腺 incidentaloma 的 75%[1]，一般人群盛行率約 3%[2]。即使在已知有惡性腫瘤的病人中，大多數腎上腺腫塊仍為良性[3]。轉移瘤在 incidentaloma 中僅佔約 1–2%[4]。因此 adenoma 遠比 metastasis 常見。
B. **錯誤**. 腎上腺腺瘤在非顯影 CT 上密度 ≤10 HU 即可確診[5]。約 70% 為 lipid-rich，密度範圍約 −2 至 16 HU；lipid-poor 腺瘤則約 20–25 HU[6]。因此「典型」腺瘤密度低於 10 HU，而非超過 20 HU。
C. **錯誤**. Opposed-phase MRI 上的訊號下降是腎上腺腺瘤最具特徵性的表現[7]。腺瘤因含有**細胞內脂質**，在 chemical shift imaging 的 opposed-phase 序列上會出現明顯 signal dropout，這是與轉移瘤鑑別的關鍵。
D. **錯誤**. 腺瘤的特性是**快速 washout**。研究顯示腺瘤在注射顯影劑後 5 分鐘即開始快速排出，15 分鐘時 washout 達 50–60%；相反地，非腺瘤（如轉移瘤）則傾向保留顯影劑8。診斷標準為 absolute washout >60% 或 relative washout >40%[7]，代表腺瘤在延遲相會大幅washout。
1. PMC4429195 — Incidental Adrenal Nodules and Masses: The Imaging Approach ↩
2. ScienceDirect — Adrenal Adenoma: An Overview ↩
3. AJR Online — Imaging of Adrenal Incidentalomas: Current Status ↩
4. Korean Endocrine Society — Clinical Guidelines for the Management of Adrenal Incidentaloma ↩
5. Medscape — Adrenal Adenoma Imaging: Practice Essentials ↩
6. PMC8722240 — Imaging Features of Atypical Adrenocortical Adenomas: A Radiological-Pathological Correlation 
7. Gland Surgery — Pitfalls and Differential Diagnosis on Adrenal Lesions: Current Concepts in CT/MR Imaging

options.text: They are a more common cause of adrenal mass than is metastatic disease.
They typically have non-IV contrast density of more than 20 Hounsfield units.
They typically show no decrease in signal intensity on opposed phase MR imaging.
They typically retain 90% of their immediate contrast value on 10-minute delayed CT exam.

2016-003.questionText: What was the principal finding of the ACCURACY (Assessment by Coronary Computed Tomographic Angiography of Individuals Undergoning Invasive Coronary Angiography) trial in terms of detection of > 70% stenosis?
2016-003.explanation:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19007693/
ACCURACY 試驗是一項前瞻multicenter研究，評估 64切 CCTA 對無已知冠狀動脈疾病患者的診斷準確性。
共 230 名受試者同時接受 CCTA 與 ICA 檢查（59.1% 男性，平均年齡 57 ± 10 歲） 。
Detection of ≥70% stenosis:
Sensitivity: 94%
Specificity: 83%
Positive predictive value (PPV): 48%
Negative predictive value (NPV): **99%** 代表 CCTA 可以 rule out significant (≥70%) coronary stenosis. 幾乎可確定排除具臨床意義的冠狀動脈狹窄，患者得以避免侵入性心導管檢查。
但冠狀動脈calcium score >400 時，特異度顯著下降（鈣化斑塊產生 blooming artifact，導致偽陽性增加）
PPV 僅 48% 反映了較高的偽陽性率，意味著 CCTA 陽性結果仍需以侵入性攝影確認。整體而言，此試驗支持 CCTA 在中等前測機率族群中作為第一線非侵入性「守門員」檢查的角色——其最大價值在於 rule-out（排除） 而非 rule-in。

options.text: Sensitivity and NPV > 90%, PPV < 75%
Sensitivity 80%, NPV > 90%, PPV< 75%
Sensitivity >90%, PPV> 90%, NPV > 90%

2016-004.questionText: What is the following description about "histopathologically a small (<= 3 cm) and predominantly lepidic growth that has 5-mm or smaller invasion, which at CT is mainly nonsolid but may have a central solid component of up to approximately 5 mm", according to 2011 classification of Classification of the spectrum of adenocarcinoma of the Lung?
2016-004.explanation:
Preinvasive Lesions
AAH（**Atypical Adenomatous Hyperplasia**，非典型腺瘤性增生）
病理：≤5 mm 的局灶性肺泡上皮非典型增生，沿肺泡壁生長
CT：純毛玻璃結節（pure GGN），≤5 mm

**Adenocarcinoma in Situ** (AIS，原位腺癌)
病理：≤3 cm，純 lepidic 生長（沿肺泡壁），無侵犯 RSNA；無間質、血管或胸膜侵犯 
黏液性：通常為非黏液性，少數可為黏液性 
CT：通常為純毛玻璃結節（nonsolid） 

**Minimally Invasive Adenocarcinoma** (MIA，微浸潤腺癌)
病理：≤3 cm，以 lepidic 生長為主，侵犯範圍 ≤5 mm 
CT：主要為毛玻璃密度，可有中央實質成分約 ≤5 mm 

**Invasive Adenocarcinoma**（浸潤性腺癌）
侵犯成分 >5 mm。依優勢組織型態分型（以 5% 增量半定量評估，選出單一優勢型態） ：
- Lepidic predominant 病理：以非黏液性 lepidic 生長為優勢的浸潤性腺癌（侵犯 >5 mm）；CT：通常為 part-solid 結節，亦可為 nonsolid 或有囊性成分 
- Acinar predominant（腺泡優勢型）病理：以腺泡型態（圓形/橢圓形腺腔結構）為優勢
- Papillary predominant（乳突優勢型）病理：以乳突狀結構（含纖維血管軸心）為優勢
- Micropapillary predominant（微乳突優勢型）病理：2011 分類新增的組織學亞型 ；腫瘤細胞形成無纖維血管軸心的小簇狀突起
- Solid predominant with mucin production（實質優勢型伴黏液產生）病理：以片狀實質生長為優勢，需有細胞內黏液證據

Variants（變異型）
Invasive mucinous adenocarcinoma (IMA，浸潤性黏液型腺癌)
病理：原分類之 mucinous BAC，現改稱 IMA American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine；以杯狀/柱狀黏液細胞沿肺泡壁生長為主
CT：表現差異大，從實質結節到肺實質化均可見 RSNA

Colloid adenocarcinoma（膠狀腺癌）
Fetal adenocarcinoma（胎兒型腺癌）
Enteric adenocarcinoma（腸型腺癌）

Ref: https://pubs.rsna.org/doi/full/10.1148/radiol.12120240

options.text: Adenocarcinoma in situ (AIS)
Minimally invasive adenocarcinoma (MIA)
Adenocarcinoma in situ (AIS)
Invasive mucinous adenocarcinoma

2016-005.questionText: Which one of the following statement is **correct**?
2016-005.explanation:
A: no LAM
B: no subpleural sparing; diffuse; child bearing woman
C: Young adult(20-40 yr)
D: no subpleural sparing

options.text: Cigarette smoking is related to the development of lymphangioleiomyomatosis (LAM), pulmonary Langerhans cell histiocytosis (PLCH), and idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF)
Thin walled cysts throughout the lung with subpleural sparing is the most common finding of LAM.
Nodules and cysts in upper and mid lungs with subpleural sparing are characteristic findings of PLCH.
Honeycombing in lower lungs with subpleural sparing is predominant in IPF.

radiation-induced-changes.name: radiation-induced-changes
keyPoints: 放射治療後中樞神經系統的影像變化依時序可分為 acute／early delayed／late delayed 三期，辨識關鍵為「治療後經過多久 + 標的病灶位置 + 放療野中含入多少正常結構」——這三點是區分 expected post-RT changes 與 tumor recurrence 的核心。

smart-syndrome.name: Stroke-like Migraine Attacks after RT（SMART Syndrome）
smart-syndrome.definition:
SMART syndrome 是 cranial RT 後罕見的延遲併發症。病人通常在 RT 後數年出現偏頭痛樣頭痛、癲癇、亞急性 stroke-like 發作（偏癱、失語、偏盲）。發作通常亞急性起病，多數數週內緩解。機轉不明，推測為大腦過度興奮伴自動調節機轉受損與遠端放射造成的血管內皮傷害。
Black 等（2013）報告 11 位 SMART syndrome 病人中 5 位（45%）有不同程度多處磁感受灶，最符合 cavernous malformation（可能是先前 RT 的後果）。影像可於症狀起始 2–7 天後出現，通常 2–5 週內緩解。
有個案系列顯示 SMART syndrome 可留下永久影像後遺——cortical laminar necrosis 可早至症狀起始 17 天後出現。RT 造成的血管傷害加上臨床與亞臨床癲癇活動可解釋皮質水腫與 BBB 完整性受損，導致持續數天至數週的強化，有時變為永久，呈現 cortical laminar necrosis。為正確診斷 SMART syndrome 並與腫瘤復發或亞急性梗塞區別，影像科醫師須熟悉其特徵影像、時間演變、與癲癇的關聯、以及可能的永久後遺。
smart-syndrome.imagingFindings:
關於影像特徵的報告多為個案或小系列。特徵性影像：
短暫、單側、gyriform 異常 T2/FLAIR 高訊號
輕度 mass effect
皮質強化伴輕度 leptomeningeal 強化
通常在放射野內
擴散受限時有時無
keyPoints: RT 數年後的 migraine + seizure + stroke-like，典型皮質 gyriform T2/FLAIR 高訊號

2023-038.questionText: Which is **wrong** about the strokelike migraine attacks after RT (SMART Syndrome)?
2023-038.explanation:
RadioGraphics 2021; 41:224–248
C. 原文是「大腦**過度興奮（hyper­excitability）**+ 自動調節受損 + 遠端放射造成的血管內皮（endothelial，**不是 epithelial**）傷害」機轉上也合邏輯：如果是 hypoexcitability（低興奮性），怎麼會合併癲癇發作？與臨床三聯徵的「seizure」直接矛盾。

options.text: present years after RT with hemiplegia, aphasia, and hemianopia
subacute in onset and resolve after weeks in most cases
driven by cerebral hypoexcitability with impaired autoregulatory mechanisms and vascular epithelial damage
transient, unilateral, gyriform abnormal FLAIR signal intensity with mild mass effect and minimal leptomeningeal enhancement,
all of above are right

2018-093.questionText: Which is **wrong** about perimesencephalic subarachnoid hemorrhage ?
2018-093.explanation:
**Perimesencephalic subarachnoid haemorrhage (PMSAH)** is a distinct pattern of subarachnoid haemorrhage (SAH), which is centred on the basal cisterns around the midbrain.
- 95% of cases have a normal cerebral angiogram and the source of bleeding is not identified; the cause is thought to be a venous bleed. This is referred to as **non-aneurysmal perimesencephalic SAH**.
- The other 5% of cases are due to a vertebrobasilar aneurysm and the prognosis is worse. Rare causes include arteriovenous malformation, dural arteriovenous fistula, trauma and vascular tumours.
Specifically, there are criteria for non-aneurysmal perimesencephalic SAH, which if fulfilled, in the presence of a negative CTA negates the need for DSA:
- SAH in perimesencephalic cisterns anterior to midbrain
- if SAH extension into the anterior interhemispheric fissure, not extending into all of the fissure
- if SAH extension into the medial Sylvian fissures, not extending into the lateral fissure
- if layering interventricular extension, no frank intraventricular haemorrhage
- no intraparenchymal haemorrhage
![ADD perimesencephalic SAH case 1](data/images/obsidian/add-perimesencephalic-sah-case-1-9e68ee95.png)

options.text: In perimesencephalic, prepontine cistern
Rebleeding rare
Digital subtraction angiography unnecessary
Posterior circulation aneurysm rupture may have same pattern

2024-001.questionText: The following description about feature of radiation-induced changes, which one is **wrong**?
2024-001.explanation:
Ref. RadioGraphics 2021; 41:224–248
A. 正確（原文：「T2 或 FLAIR 上大腦白質高訊號」）
B. 正確（原文：「依表現時間，放射線誘發的傷害可分為三期：acute、early delayed、late delayed」）
C 的錯誤：原文說的是「RT 後（after RT）經過的時間」，不是「during RT（RT 期間）」。這個時序是用來判讀追蹤影像，指的是 RT 完成之後到目前掃描的時間間隔，因為：
Acute = 治療中～治療後數天至數週
Early delayed = RT 後 1–6 個月
Late delayed = RT 後 > 6 個月
D. 正確

options.text: Radiation-induced leukoencephalopathy is characterized by cerebral white matter high signal intensity on T2-weighted or fluid-attenuated inversion-recovery (FLAIR) images
Radiation-induced injury can be divided into three phases: acute, early delayed, and late delayed
Keys to recognizing radiation-induced changes at follow-up imaging are knowledge of the amount of time during RT
Radiation-induced leukoencephalopathy exhibits diffuse and symmetric involvement after whole-brain RT, with relative sparing of the subcortical U-fiber, corpus callosum, and gray matter
